next_action: Return to causal_verifier with a non-source-public-price inventory-path mechanism; do not run EC2 shadow/canary until a local verifier returns KEEP under the scoring contract.

scoring_contract.final_economic_objective: pair_pnl + residual_settle_or_mark_pnl - official_fee - stress_or_impact_budget must be positive and stable before deployment evidence can be claimed.
